data.name: Aardvark Therapeutics, Inc.
data.description: Aardvark Therapeutics, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, focuses on developing small-molecule therapeutics to activate innate homeostatic pathways for the treatment of metabolic diseases. Aardvark Therapeutics, Inc. was incorporated in 2017 and is headquartered in San Diego, California....

data.name: Alpha Cognition Inc.
data.description: Alpha Cognition Inc., a biopharmaceutical company, engages in the development of treatments for patients suffering from neurodegenerative diseases in the United States and Canada. The company's commercial development program includes ZUNVEYL oral tablet formulation for treating Alzheimer's disease. data.name: Ares Commercial Real Estate Corporation
data.description: Ares Commercial Real Estate Corporation, a specialty finance company, engages in the originating and investing in commercial real estate (CRE) loans and related investments in the United States. The company provides loan opportunities for the owners, operators, and sponsors of CRE properties.
